title: NetJets' first fatal crash kills influential Texas VC founder
summary: A NetJets aircraft crashed onto a Texas highway, killing a prominent tech entrepreneur. The cause remains under investigation. This marks a significant incident for the private aviation company.
content: NetJets is not speculating on what caused one of its planes to crash onto a highway in Laredo, Texas late Tuesday, killing a prominent tech entrepreneur.

zh.title: NetJets首次致命坠机事故夺去德州风险投资家创始人的生命
zh.summary: 一架NetJets飞机坠毁在德州高速公路上,导致一位杰出科技企业家身亡。事故原因仍在调查中。这标志着这家私人航空公司的一次重大事件。

title: This nuclear stock will benefit from AI datacenter buildout and soaring energy demand, Roth Capital says
summary: Nano Nuclear Energy stock could appreciate as it nears commercialization amid surging AI datacenter energy demand, according to Roth Capital analysts. The company's timing aligns with growing infrastructure needs.
content: Stock in Nano Nuclear Energy should appreciate as it nears commercialization of its reactor plans while energy demand is surging, Roth Capital said.

zh.title: Roth Capital表示该核能股票将受益于AI数据中心建设和能源需求飙升
zh.summary: 据Roth Capital分析师表示,纳米核能公司股票可能会升值,因为它接近商业化,同时AI数据中心的能源需求激增。该公司的时机与日益增长的基础设施需求相符。

title: Here are the most overbought and oversold names after a volatile week
summary: Applied Materials and Citigroup emerged as the week's most overbought stocks, while Accenture and Fox Corporation were among the most oversold amid market volatility. The divergence highlights shifting investor sentiment across sectors.
content: Applied Materials and Citigroup were among this week's most overbought names, while Accenture and Fox Corporation were on the opposite side.

zh.title: 波动的一周之后,这些是最超买和超卖的股票
zh.summary: 在市场波动中,应用材料公司和花旗集团成为本周最超买的股票,而埃森哲和福克斯公司则是最超卖的股票。这种分化凸显了投资者跨行业情绪的转变。

title: Struggling to find a job? Try looking in Nevada
summary: Nevada has become an unexpected hiring hotspot despite its sparse population, offering job seekers better opportunities than many larger states. The state's economic growth is driven partly by its casino industry and business-friendly environment.
content: The sparsely populated state known for its world-class casinos and dry climate has been a hiring hot spot.

zh.title: 找不到工作？试试内华达州
zh.summary: 尽管人口稀少，内华达州已成为意外的招聘热点，为求职者提供了比许多更大州更好的机会。该州的经济增长主要由其赌场产业和商业友好的环境驱动。

title: Trading in French server company suspended after short seller’s accusations trigger stock collapse
summary: Trading in a French technology company was suspended following damaging accusations from a short seller, causing its stock to collapse. The incident highlights the ongoing impact of short-seller investigations on market confidence.
content: Trading of ordinary shares in the French technology company have been suspended following allegations from a short seller.

zh.title: 法国服务器公司因做空者指控股价暴跌后停止交易
zh.summary: 在做空者提出有害指控后，一家法国科技公司停止交易，导致其股价崩盘。这一事件突显了做空者调查对市场信心的持续影响。

title: Jio Platforms eyes low-orbit satellite rollout as Starlink awaits India launch
summary: Jio Platforms, India's largest telecom operator, is pursuing low-orbit satellite communications as Starlink continues to await regulatory approval in India. The move could reshape India's broadband landscape and competition.
content: Jio Platforms, India's largest telecom operator and digital services company, wants to rollout statelite communication in the country where Starlink still awaits launch.

zh.title: Jio Platforms启动低轨卫星计划，Starlink仍在等待印度发布
zh.summary: 印度最大的电信运营商Jio Platforms正在开展低轨卫星通信业务，而Starlink仍在等待印度的监管批准。这一举措可能会改变印度的宽带格局和竞争态势。

title: Fed watching is looking very different now. Two charts can help you in the Warsh era.
summary: Kevin Warsh's leadership at the Federal Reserve is shifting market dynamics and investment strategy benchmarks. Investors need new frameworks to navigate the central bank's changing policy approach.
content: Kevin Warsh is forcing Wall Street to do the heavy lifting. Use these benchmarks to find your footing.

zh.title: 美联储观察现在看起来大不相同。两张图表可以帮助你应对沃什时代
zh.summary: 凯文·沃什在美联储的领导改变了市场动态和投资战略基准。投资者需要新的框架来应对中央银行变化的政策方法。

title: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'
summary: Apple is considering raising prices to address what CEO Tim Cook described as an "unsustainable" memory shortage across the industry. The move underscores the severity of semiconductor constraints on major technology companies.
content: Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with what CEO Tim Cook called an "unsustainable" memory shortage.

zh.title: 内存危机达到如此极端的程度，甚至苹果也无法幸免
zh.summary: 苹果正在考虑提价以解决首席执行官蒂姆·库克描述为"不可持续"的整个行业内存短缺问题。这一举措突显了半导体制约对主要科技公司的严重影响。

title: ‘I became invisible when I turned 60’: The hidden crisis of late-career unemployment
summary: Job loss after age 50 can be financially devastating and create lasting economic hardship for older workers who may struggle to find new employment. Age discrimination in hiring compounds the challenge of late-career job transitions.
content: A job loss is devastating at any age. After 50, it can completely shatter your finances.

zh.title: '我在60岁时变得隐形了'：晚年失业的隐性危机
zh.summary: 50岁后失业可能在经济上造成灾难性影响，并为可能难以找到新工作的老年工人造成持久的经济困难。招聘中的年龄歧视加剧了晚年工作转换的挑战。

title: The Fed’s new hawkish reality just forced Goldman Sachs to slash its gold forecast by $500
summary: Goldman Sachs downgraded its year-end gold price forecast from $5,400 to $4,900 per ounce due to the Federal Reserve's hawkish monetary stance. The revision reflects anticipated higher interest rates reducing gold's appeal as an investment.
content: Strategists at the investment bank see gold rising to $4,900 an oune by the end of the year instead of $5,400.

zh.title: 美联储新的鹰派态度迫使高盛将黄金预测下调500美元
zh.summary: 由于美联储鹰派的货币政策立场，高盛将年底黄金价格预测从每盎司5400美元下调至4900美元。这一调整反映了预期中的更高利率将削弱黄金作为投资品的吸引力。

title: Trump picked Kevin Warsh to cut rates. The new Fed chief just told us he has other plans.
summary: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh, appointed with expectations of rate cuts, has instead signaled a hawkish agenda focused on other priorities. The divergence raises questions about future monetary policy and market implications.
content: Here’s what the central bank’s hawkish agenda means for your money.

zh.title: 特朗普选择凯文·沃什降低利率。新美联储主席却告诉我们他有其他计划。
zh.summary: 美联储主席凯文·沃什本被寄予降低利率的期望，但他反而发出了鹰派信号，专注于其他优先事项。这种偏离引发了对未来货币政策和市场影响的疑问。

title: Plans to end gazumping with binding agreements in house sales shake-up
summary: New housing reform plans will make sales agreements legally binding sooner and require sellers to provide more property information upfront. The changes aim to reduce unfair practices like gazumping in the UK real estate market.
content: Sales agreements will be legally binding sooner and making sellers provide more home information up front are part of the planned changes.

zh.title: 房屋销售改革计划通过具有约束力的协议来结束"抬价"现象
zh.summary: 新的住房改革计划将使销售协议更早具有法律约束力，并要求卖方提前提供更多房产信息。这些改革旨在减少英国房地产市场中"抬价"等不公平做法。

title: Social media declared Cursor dead. Then SpaceX handed the AI startup a $60 billion lifeline.
summary: SpaceX invested $60 billion in Cursor, an AI coding assistant that had been dismissed after Anthropic's Claude Code gained prominence. The funding positions Cursor to compete for leadership in the AI development tools market.
content: Written off after the rise of Anthropic’s Claude Code, Cursor now looks to reclaim its crown as a vibe-coding heavyweight with SpaceX’s backing

zh.title: 社交媒体宣布Cursor已死，随后SpaceX向这家AI初创公司提供600亿美元救命钱
zh.summary: SpaceX向被Anthropic的Claude Code击败而被否定的AI编码助手Cursor投资了600亿美元。这笔融资使Cursor能够竞争AI开发工具市场的领导地位。

title: Why the Fed’s hawkish stance signals a step-change in U.S. dollar sentiment — and a new direction
summary: The Federal Reserve's hawkish monetary stance is boosting dollar demand through higher interest rate differentials, strong growth prospects, and capital demand from AI investment. The shift signals a sustained bullish outlook for the U.S. currency.
content: Interest rate differentials, growth prospects, demand for capital from AI investment and bumper stock market issuance is generating demand for the  dollar and a bullish impulse

zh.title: 为什么美联储的鹰派立场预示着美元情绪的质变——以及新方向
zh.summary: 美联储的鹰派货币政策通过更高的利率差异、强劲的增长前景和AI投资带来的资本需求来提高美元需求。这一转变预示着美元持续看涨的前景。

title: U.S. opens tariff probe targeting Germany’s drug pricing policies
summary: The U.S. Trade Representative opened a tariff investigation against Germany's pharmaceutical pricing proposals, calling the policy a "serious step backwards." The probe reflects growing trade tensions over healthcare costs and pricing regulations.
content: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said Germany's proposal to reduce spending on medicines was "a serious step backwards."

zh.title: 美国启动关税调查，针对德国的药品定价政策
zh.summary: 美国贸易代表开启了针对德国制药定价提案的关税调查，称该政策是"严重的倒退"。该调查反映了在医疗成本和定价监管方面日益加剧的贸易紧张局势。

title: UK gilt yields jump as borrowing rises and PM Starmer faces leadership challenge
summary: UK gilt yields rise as government borrowing increases, while Prime Minister Starmer faces internal political challenges. The shift reflects growing concerns about fiscal pressures and leadership stability within Labour.
content: Andy Burnham won the Makerfield by-election, defeating Reform UK by more than 9,000 votes with nearly 55% of the vote.

zh.title: 英国金边债收益率上升 借款增加 首相斯塔默面临领导力挑战
zh.summary: 英国金边债收益率因政府借款增加而上升，同时首相斯塔默面临工党内部政治挑战。这一变化反映了人们对财政压力和工党领导力稳定性的日益担忧。

title: What this biotech's volatile stock price tells you about the weight loss market right now
summary: Investor enthusiasm for Zealand Pharmaceuticals' weight loss drugs has cooled, prompting a market pivot toward amylin-based medicines as the next growth frontier in the competitive obesity treatment space.
content: While the market's enthusiasm for one of Zealand's experimental drugs has cooled, investors are shifting focus to amylin-based medicines as a growth driver

zh.title: 这家生物技术公司波动的股价向你揭示了减肥市场的现状
zh.summary: 投资者对Zealand Pharmaceuticals减肥药物的热情已经冷却，促使市场转向以胰淀素为基础的药物，作为竞争激烈的肥胖症治疗领域的下一个增长前沿。

title: UK borrowing in May surges by more than expected
summary: UK government borrowing in May surged beyond forecasts, signaling increased fiscal pressure amid higher spending relative to tax revenues.
content: Borrowing is the difference between spending and income from taxes.

zh.title: 英国5月借款激增超预期
zh.summary: 英国政府5月借款超出预期激增，表明在支出相对于税收收入增加的情况下财政压力加大。

title: Oil rebounds as postponed U.S.-Iran talks temper optimism over ceasefire progress
summary: Oil prices rebound as delayed U.S.-Iran negotiations dampen optimism over Middle East ceasefire progress, though easing supply concerns and renewed tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz provide some price support.
content: With immediate supply fears fading and tanker traffic returning to the Strait of Hormuz, traders are turning their attention back to oil demand and OPEC's outlook for the market.

zh.title: 随着推迟的美伊谈判打击停火进展乐观情绪，油价反弹
zh.summary: 由于美伊谈判延迟，油价反弹，削弱了对中东停火进展的乐观情绪，但供应担忧缓解和霍尔木兹海峡油轮运输增加为油价提供了一些支撑。

title: U.S.-Iran accord hits early snag after Swiss talks fail to proceed as planned
summary: Negotiations on a U.S.-Iran accord encounter early setbacks after planned Swiss talks fail to proceed, with analysts warning that lasting Middle East conflict resolution will require extended timelines.
content: Analysts reckon a lasting resolution to the Middle East conflict will take some time to materialize.

zh.title: 美伊协议在瑞士谈判未能按计划进行后陷入困境
zh.summary: 美伊协议谈判在计划的瑞士谈判未能按时进行后遭遇早期挫折，分析人士警告称，持久解决中东冲突需要更长的时间框架。

title: Farnham sets out 'ambitious' vision for island
summary: An island chief minister candidate unveils an ambitious platform centered on cost reduction, investment growth, and expanded housing supply to address local economic challenges.
content: Only chief minister candidate wants to tackle costs, boost investment and increase housing supply.

zh.title: 法纳姆为岛屿阐述"雄心勃勃"的愿景
zh.summary: 一名岛屿首席部长候选人公布了一项雄心勃勃的平台，重点是降低成本、促进投资增长和扩大住房供应，以应对当地经济挑战。

title: Indian IT stocks slump up to 7% as Accenture cuts revenue outlook, fueling fresh concerns over sector growth
summary: Indian IT stocks fall up to 7% after global sector leader Accenture cuts revenue guidance, intensifying concerns about near-term growth prospects across the technology services industry.
content: Shares of major Indian IT companies fall up to 7% after global sector leader Accenture cuts its revenue guidance.

zh.title: 埃森哲下调收入预期，印度IT股票下跌至7%，引发行业增长新忧虑
zh.summary: 全球行业龙头埃森哲下调收入指引后，印度IT股票下跌至7%，加剧了对科技服务业近期增长前景的担忧

title: Yen slides past 161 against the dollar, nearing 40-year low and reviving intervention bets
summary: The Japanese yen weakens past 161 per dollar to its lowest level since July 2024, prompting speculation about potential central bank intervention to stabilize the currency.
content: On Thursday the yen saw a sharp depreciation a high of 161.80, its weakest since July 2024.

zh.title: 日元对美元跌破161，接近40年低位，重燃央行干预预期
zh.summary: 日元兑美元跌至161以下，创2024年7月以来最低水平，引发市场对央行干预稳定汇率的猜测

title: MSCI isn't done with Indonesia yet: new report signals continued concerns over market transparency
summary: Index provider MSCI continues scrutinizing Indonesia's stock market, flagging persistent transparency concerns that could threaten market confidence and foreign investment flows.
content: MSCI flagged growing concerns about transparency in Indonesia's stock market.

zh.title: MSCI对印度尼西亚的审查未完成：新报告表明市场透明度持续引发关切
zh.summary: 指数编制商MSCI继续审查印度尼西亚股票市场，指出存在可能威胁市场信心和外资流入的持久透明度问题

title: Is Tesla succeeding in AI? Watch this for a clue.
summary: Tesla's artificial intelligence progress remains uncertain as investors monitor capital allocation decisions for signals about the company's technology development trajectory.
content: As Tesla has doubled down on artificial intelligence, investors are left trying to make sense of the company’s progress. According to analysts at Oppenheimer, tracking how Tesla spends its cash may provide some insight.

zh.title: 特斯拉在人工智能上成功了吗? 看这个就知道
zh.summary: 特斯拉人工智能的进展仍不确定，投资者在关注其资本配置决策，以寻求该公司技术发展方向的信号。

title: Why Japan's $70 billion-plus intervention and a rate hike didn't prop up the yen more
summary: Despite Japan's $70 billion-plus yen defense intervention and a rate hike, currency weakness persists, raising questions about policy effectiveness against structural economic headwinds.
content: Japan was willing to step in to defend the yen around the 160 level before, and it's at that point again.

zh.title: 为什么日本70多亿美元的干预和加息未能更有效地支持日元
zh.summary: 尽管日本进行了70多亿美元的日元防御干预并加息，但货币疲软依然存在，引发了对政策在对抗结构性经济逆风方面有效性的质疑。

title: U.S.-Iran deal in photos: ships in the Strait of Hormuz, daily life in Tehran
summary: Following a U.S.-Iran agreement to end the Middle East conflict, early signs of regional recovery emerge as shipping traffic resumes in the Strait of Hormuz and daily life normalizes in Tehran.
content: The first signs of a post-war recovery are emerging across the Middle East after the United States and Iran signed a memorandum aimed at ending the conflict.

zh.title: 美国-伊朗协议图片展: 霍尔木兹海峡的船队，德黑兰的日常生活
zh.summary: 美国-伊朗协议结束中东冲突后，随着霍尔木兹海峡的海运恢复和德黑兰日常生活正常化，该地区复苏的初步迹象开始显现。

title: Japan core inflation holds steady in May, matching expectations despite energy price concerns
summary: Japan's core inflation held steady in May, matching economist expectations with headline inflation rising to 1.5% while core-core inflation eased to 1.8%. This steady-state reading suggests the Bank of Japan's monetary policy decisions remain on track despite ongoing energy price concerns.
content: Headline inflation edged up to 1.5% from 1.4%, while the so called "core-core" inflation rate, eased to 1.8% from 1.9%.

zh.title: 日本5月核心通胀保持稳定，符合预期，尽管存在能源价格担忧
zh.summary: 日本5月核心通胀保持稳定，符合经济学家预期，总体通胀率升至1.5%，而核心-核心通胀率缓和至1.8%。这一稳定的数据表明日本央行的货币政策决定保持在正轨上，尽管存在持续的能源价格担忧。

title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
summary: Trump characterized his negotiated Iran peace agreement as "unconditional surrender," claiming his power has "no limits" in handling the diplomatic victory. He stated the deal was necessary to prevent the conflict from triggering a global economic depression.
content: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.

zh.title: 特朗普声称伊朗协议是"无条件投降"，称其权力"无限"：Axios
zh.summary: 特朗普将其谈判达成的伊朗和平协议称为"无条件投降"，声称他在处理这一外交胜利方面的权力"无限"。他表示这项协议对于防止冲突引发全球经济衰退是必要的。

title: South Korea's Kospi extends record run as Asia markets open mixed; Samsung, SK Hynix hit all-time highs
summary: South Korea's Kospi index extended its record-setting run as Asian markets opened with mixed performance, with Samsung and SK Hynix reaching all-time highs. The gains reflect investor optimism about the durability of the U.S.-brokered peace agreement with Iran.
content: Asia-Pacific markets were set to trade mixed on Friday as investors assessed the durability of a U.S.-brokered peace agreement with Iran.

zh.title: 韩国综合指数延续创纪录走势，亚洲市场开盘涨跌互现；三星、SK海力士创历史新高
zh.summary: 韩国综合指数延续其创纪录的走势，亚洲市场开盘时涨跌互现，三星和SK海力士创历史新高。这些涨幅反映了投资者对美国斡旋的伊朗和平协议耐久性的乐观态度。
